title: [HWToBTOR2] Generate register initial constant before state declaration

features.name: seq.compreg with initial constant value
features.description: Code should include a seq.compreg register with an initial value supplied via seq.initial containing hw.constant, where the constant must be declared before the state/register

features.name: seq.initial with hw.constant for register initialization
features.description: Code should include a seq.initial operation containing a hw.constant that provides an initial value for a seq.compreg register
